questions.text: Outline any concerns with the competitive impact of the Acquisition on the supply of medical imaging software. Are GE Healthcare and Intelerad close competitors and what alternatives are available?
Outline any differences in medical imaging software requirements between inpatient and outpatient facilities.

Outline any concerns with the impact of the Acquisition on the ability and/or incentive of GE Healthcare to alter the interoperability of its medical imaging software or medical imaging equipment with those of other providers.

Outline any concerns regarding the impact of the Acquisition on the ability and/or incentive of GE Healthcare to link the sale of specific medical imaging software with specific medical imaging equipment and vice versa.
Provide any additional information or comments that you consider relevant to the ACCC’s assessment of the Acquisition.
Provide a brief description of your business or organisation, including any commercial relationships with GE Healthcare and/or Intelerad.
